name: Possible Info Stealer via Misnamed AutoIt Interpreter
description: Detects AutoIt interpreter ending with '.com' or '.pif' or running from suspicious paths associated with Lumma Stealer. These stealers exfiltrate browser credentials and cryptocurrency wallet information, posing significant security risks.

filterSets.name: Possible Info Stealer via Misnamed AutoIt Interpreter

author: Yusuf Madkour & Ahmed Kamal
